name: Minimal Task Board

releases.author: selectstarfromusers
releases.description:
Addresses the new Obsidian Community portal automated review scorecard (128 findings on v0.1.3).

## Highlights

- **DOM**: All `document.createElement(...)` calls now use Obsidian's `createDiv()` / `createSpan()` / `createEl()` / `createSvg()`. Bare `document.X` and `setTimeout/clearTimeout` calls now use `activeDocument` / `activeWindow.setTimeout` for popout-window compatibility.
- **TypeScript**: New `TaskFrontmatter` interface in `src/types.ts` narrows all `metadataCache.getFileCache(...).frontmatter` reads — fixes the bulk of no-unsafe-* lint warnings.
- **CSS**: Removed all `!important` declarations (bumped specificity via `.ot-view` parent selector instead). Merged duplicate `.ot-task-row` definition. Expanded short hex.
- **Hygiene**: Added `CONTRIBUTING.md`.

## Deferred for a follow-up patch

- `package-lock.json` — needs a local `npm install` (was generated outside this session).
- `.github/workflows/release.yml` with `actions/attest-build-provenance@v2` — needs OAuth `workflow` scope to push; will land in a follow-up so future releases get GitHub-signed build attestations attached automatically.

No behavioral changes — refactor only.
releases.name: 0.1.4 — Obsidian Community scorecard cleanup

releases.author: selectstarfromusers
releases.description:
Address ObsidianReviewBot follow-up findings:

- `main.ts`: await revealLeaf() calls
- `settings.ts`: remove "General" heading
- Sentence-case fixes in settings.ts, bucketComponent.ts, taskView.ts
- `taskView.ts`: drop unused async on onOpen()

releases.author: selectstarfromusers
releases.description: Address ObsidianReviewBot required findings: unhandled promises, async-without-await, innerHTML, setHeading() API, inline styles, FileManager.trashFile, sentence-case UI strings.

releases.author: selectstarfromusers
releases.description: Rename plugin id to minimal-task-board (per Obsidian community plugin guidelines).

releases.author: selectstarfromusers
releases.description:
Initial release.                                          
                  
  - Board and Focus view modes
  - Customizable buckets (create as many as you want, any name)                                                                                                                                                                                                                
  - Secondary grouping by any frontmatter property             
  - Inline #task tracking from notes with [[Group]] support                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  - Bidirectional sync between board and source notes       
  - Drag-and-drop between buckets                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
  - Completion animations                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
  - ARIA accessibility and keyboard navigation                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
  - Mobile-friendly touch targets                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
  - Settings UI for all configuration
releases.name: v0.1.0
